titleStmt.title: SII 29.90: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 90. (A.R. No. B. 582 of 1961-62.) KURAḌI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab near the temple of Rāmalinga.

This damaged and very much effaced inscriptions is in 11th-12th century A.D. characters. It refers to the rule of king Tribhuvanamalladēva and a land grant for the worship and offerings of the god (name lost) by Rebbaladēvi, the wife probably of mahādaṇḍanāyaka Raviyana bhaṭṭa. Further, it registers land grants for burning of perpetual lamp in the temple and for offerings to the god Rebbalēśvara by the daṇḍanāyaka himself. Also, it refers to Ayyaṇavāḍi and sarvanamasya (agrahāra) Rūḍi.

The lands so granted are measured in two types of rods of measurement called (1) Kēśvadēva(ra) kōlu and (2) Māṇikēśvarada kōlu. The samashta prajes of the place also joined hands with the daṇḍanāyaka in making grants.
In the date portion only śu. 3 Vaḍḍavāra [aksha]ya tṛitīya in available and the rest of the information is lost. Akshaya tṛitīya occurs in the month of Vaiśakha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: [Few lines in the beginning are lost].

svāmi nāmadhēyā (nvayam) . Āvibhu
(jja) yōgēśvarananā viprōttamanā khiḷa vēdi śaṁkara bhaṭṭa . Avaroḍane puṭṭi
narddhāṁgi kavi varasute rebbaṇe lakkāṁbi vīra guṇōdāre negaḻdaḻava nītaḷa dōḷu . natariṁpu
mayūkhanavaprasūnu raṁjita padapaṁkajaṁ pra(vīra) vipravarāḻige vikramadharā pati padadi
yyaṇavāḍi nāḻkaḻaṁ śritimeneseda rūḍiyanadaṁ sarvvanamasya māgiralu . Anavadya śrī
veḷege tiḷaka midenalesedudā karame
maddapogasu(ra kavi) kāledu
vēḻapanardhāṁgi mahāsati rebbaladēvi
śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
bhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarā
dmōpajīvi samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahā
ḍa daṁḍanāyaka raviyaṇa bhaṭṭaru . (śu)ddha 3 vaḍḍavāra (akṣa)
ya tṛtīyā mahāparvva nimittaṁ dēsa
vargge pūje punaskārakkeṁdu Āryā
tta kēśavadēva kōlalu biṭṭanella mattaru
ṇikēśvarada mattaṟippattu . Aṁtū
renisida nirmmaḻa bhāvandūṟayi(du) parōśidake
ta sukhasvadmanakalōsiri(yaṁ)
janastutyamaṁ koṁḍu
tāraṁbaraṁ . © mattaṁ rebbalēśvaradēvara naṁdādīvigege saṁṇayile
ḷupidare daṁ (dōsa) Ā vūṟinava(rgge) māṇi(kē)śvarada ma
ḻalu māṇikēśvarada (kōlali kariya nelaṁ) mattaru hattu . mattaṁ muddhela (pe)
gaḍakōḻoḷage rebbalēsvaradēvargge nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādi
mattaṁ daṁḍanāyakara hattu vṛttiyaṁ māḍuva samasta prajegaḷa
ṟu śrī rebbalēśvaradēvarige vīsaveraḍu A(pta) muttarige vīsave
kāśiyoḷu sāsira kavilegaḷa (vade)ha dōsa . brāhmaṇaṟige dānakoṭṭa phala
Digital edition of SII 29.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
